# Psalms 77

## Verses (20)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | I was crying to God with my voice; even to God with my voice, and he gave ear to me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | In the day of my trouble, my heart was turned to the Lord: my hand was stretched out in the night without resting; my soul would not be comforted. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | I will keep God in memory, with sounds of grief; my thoughts are troubled, and my spirit is overcome. (Selah.) | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | You keep my eyes from sleep; I am so troubled that no words come. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | My thoughts go back to the days of the past, to the years which are gone. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | The memory of my song comes back to me in the night; my thoughts are moving in my heart; my spirit is searching with care. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Will the Lord put me away for ever? will he be kind no longer? | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Is his mercy quite gone for ever? has his word come to nothing? | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | Has God put away the memory of his pity? are his mercies shut up by his wrath? (Selah.) | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | And I said, It is a weight on my spirit; but I will keep in mind the years of the right hand of the Most High. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | I will keep in mind the works of Jah: I will keep the memory of your wonders in the past. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | I will give thought to all your work, while my mind goes over your acts of power. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | Your way, O God, is holy: what god is so great as our God? | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | You are the God who does works of power: you have made your strength clear to the nations. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | With your arm you have made your people free, the sons of Jacob and Joseph. (Selah.) | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | The waters saw you, O God; the waters saw you, they were in fear: even the deep was troubled. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | The clouds sent out water; the skies gave out a sound; truly, your arrows went far and wide. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | The voice of your thunder went rolling on; the world was flaming with the light of the storm; the earth was shaking. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | Your way was in the sea, and your road in the great waters; there was no knowledge of your footsteps. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | You were guiding your people like a flock, by the hand of Moses and Aaron. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
